options: Roadmap results from any time, sorted by date
Only roadmap results changed in the last seven days
Only roadmap documents, regardless of date
Roadmap results you authored
questions.explanation: updated: bounds results by recency; past_week keeps only what changed in the last seven days.

questions.prompt: How do you isolate results from Q1 2026 with a precise date window?
options: updated:past_month
my:history 2026
questions.explanation: after: and before: take quoted dates; stacking both bounds isolates one exact window.

questions.prompt: What is the difference between `in:` and `collection:`?
options: in: searches a container that exists; collection: searches a saved set you built
They are identical
in: searches by date; collection: searches by type
collection: only works in Slack
questions.explanation: in: scopes to an existing container like a space or folder; collection: scopes to a set you curated.

questions.prompt: When is `my:history pricing` the right move?
options: When you want every pricing doc in the company
When you've already seen the pricing doc and need to re-find it
When you want to filter by document type
When you want the newest pricing docs only
questions.explanation: my:history restricts results to documents you've already viewed, so re-finding is faster than a cold search.

questions.prompt: After Glean Assistant gives a cited answer, what is the governed next step?
options: Trust it because it has citations
Open each citation and confirm it supports the claim and isn't stale
Re-run the question to see if the answer changes
Copy the answer and move on
questions.explanation: Citations are a starting point, not a verdict; open each source, confirm it backs the claim, and check the dates.
